  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to GenoSim: Forward-Time Genotype Simulation

Reference

All functions

compute_fst()

Compute Weir-Cockerham FST Between Generations

compute_ld()

Compute Pairwise Linkage Disequilibrium

detect_roh()

Detect Runs of Homozygosity

diversity_metrics()

Compute Population Diversity Metrics Per Generation

example_pedigree

Example Pedigree: FAM_KHAN (25-member, 4-generation consanguineous family)

example_ped_path()

Get Path to Example Pedigree CSV File

example_vcf_dir()

Get Path to Example VCF Directory

export_csv()

Export All Simulation Results to Tidy CSV Files

export_plink()

Export Simulated Genotypes to PLINK Format

export_vcf()

Export Simulated Genotypes to VCF Format

extract_mating_pairs()

Extract Mating Pairs from a Pedigree

GenoSim GenoSim-package

GenoSim: Forward-Time Genotype Simulator for Clinical and Population Genetics

hwe_test()

Hardy-Weinberg Equilibrium Test

load_af_from_file()

Load allele frequencies from a file

plot_af_comparison()

Plot Observed vs Simulated Allele Frequency Comparison

plot_af_trajectory()

Plot Allele Frequency Trajectories Across Generations

plot_dashboard()

Six-Panel Summary Dashboard

plot_fis_trajectory()

Plot Inbreeding Coefficient F_IS Across Generations

plot_heterozygosity()

Plot Observed vs Expected Heterozygosity Per Generation

plot_kinship_heatmap()

Plot Kinship Coefficient Heatmap

plot_ld_decay()

Plot LD Decay

plot_maf_distribution()

Plot MAF Distribution Per Generation

plot_pca()

Plot PCA of Simulated Genotypes

plot_pedigree_tree()

Draw a Family Pedigree Tree

plot_roh_per_individual()

Plot ROH Length Per Individual

read_pedigree()

Read and Validate a Pedigree CSV File

read_vcf_cohort()

Read a Family VCF Cohort into a Dosage Matrix

reference_populations()

Return gnomAD-derived population parameters

run_pca()

Principal Component Analysis on Genotype Matrix

simulate_from_pedigree()

Simulate Genotype Data Constrained by a Real Family Pedigree and VCF

simulate_population()

Simulate Diploid SNP Genotype Data Across Generations (Population Mode)

simulate_population_stratified()

Simulate a population with stratification using Balding-Nichols model

summarise_pedigree()

Print a Structured Summary of a Pedigree
